_comment: Pinned graphql/ConversationModelStatuses request. The server safelists this exact operation via x-databricks-operation-identifier (a signature over operationName+query+variables), so it must be replayed verbatim -- do NOT trim clientIds or reformat query. Re-capture from a HAR if Databricks changes the operation (a 400 'operation not authentic' means it drifted). Models are still discovered live from the response; the provider keeps only the AVAILABLE ones for the editor-assistant-agent-mode clientId. See docs/discovery/2026-07-13-databricks-model-discovery.md.
